hero.badge: Private holiday apartment in Cochem on the Moselle
hero.h1: Holiday apartment Cochem with castle & Moselle views
hero.subtitle: 65 m² for 1–2 guests: balcony, terrace, panoramic views of Reichsburg Castle Cochem and the Moselle valley. Quiet location, about a 10-minute walk to the old town — enquire directly with the Maringer family.

facts.subtitle: Key facts for your Moselle holiday, at a glance.
facts.lage_desc: Central yet quiet. Walking distance to the old town, Reichsburg Castle and the Moselle promenade. Enjoy direct castle & Moselle views from the balcony and terrace.
facts.ideal_desc: Cosy apartment for 1–2 persons. Sunny balcony and private terrace for relaxing with Moselle views.
facts.parking_desc: A private parking space directly at the house is reserved for your stay. Arrive comfortably and explore Cochem on foot.
facts.wifi_desc: Fast, reliable internet for undisturbed work or evening streaming. Work with a Moselle view.

details.subtitle: Concrete facts about the accommodation so you can quickly decide whether it fits your holiday.
details.outdoor_value: balcony, terrace/covered sitting area and garden
details.view_value: Reichsburg Castle Cochem and Moselle valley
details.location_value: quiet, about 10 minutes on foot to the old town
details.parking_value: private parking space directly at the house
details.pets_value: not allowed, out of consideration for allergy sufferers

gallery.subtitle: Take a look at your home away from home on the Moselle.

map.subtitle: Central in Cochem — walking distance to the old town, Reichsburg Castle and Moselle promenade.
map.badge_radweg: Moselle cycle path reachable in Cochem

guide.h2: What you can experience in Cochem
guide.subtitle: Cochem is a well-known holiday destination on the Moselle. Here are practical notes for your stay.
guide.burg_desc: The impressive castle towers above the town and is within walking distance of our apartment. Views of Reichsburg Castle and the Moselle valley are part of the stay: from the balcony, covered sitting area and apartment.
guide.wine_desc: Forget the crowded tourist restaurants. We'll tell you which small winery in the neighbouring village offers the real Moselle taste — including a personal hiking recommendation through the vineyards.
guide.bike_desc: The Moselle cycle path is easy to reach in Cochem. For quieter tours, the side valleys such as the Enderttal are a good option. You can store your bikes safely with us.
guide.ship_desc: Discover the Moselle region from the water or stroll through the winding lanes of the old town. Cosy cafés, small boutiques and the Moselle promenade are all within walking distance.

cochem_guide.subtitle: Practical notes on castle views, excursions, food and your hosts.
cochem_guide.parken_desc: What's the best route? Tips for your arrival, parking and excursions in the Cochem area.
cochem_guide.reichsburg_desc: Notes on Reichsburg Castle — and why the view from the balcony and covered sitting area belongs to the apartment.
cochem_guide.wetter_desc: When is the Moselle at its best? Our honest seasonal guide from spring to winter.
cochem_guide.restaurants_desc: Restaurants, wine taverns and wineries in Cochem — personal recommendations for food lovers.
cochem_guide.gastgeber_desc: Meet Christa & Winfried Maringer — your direct local contacts.
cochem_guide.burgblick_desc: Why the best view of Reichsburg Castle is not from the castle, but from our balcony.

pricing.subtitle: Transparent conditions. No hidden booking fees like on big portals.
pricing.bestpreis: Direct from the host, no portal fees
pricing.inkl_3: Private parking space right at the house
pricing.mindestaufenthalt: Minimum stay: 5 nights. Excluding local tourist tax.
pricing.cta: Request your preferred dates — we usually respond the same day

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your trip to Cochem.
faq.q1: How far is it from the apartment to Cochem's old town?
faq.a1: You can reach the historic old town of Cochem as well as the Moselle promenade in about a 10-minute leisurely walk. You'll stay centrally, yet absolutely peacefully away from the hustle and bustle.
faq.q2: Can we store our bicycles safely?
faq.a2: Yes! We offer secure, covered storage for your (electric) bicycles right at the property.
faq.a3: Out of consideration for allergy sufferers, pets are unfortunately not permitted in our apartment. We appreciate your understanding.
faq.a4: Yes, a comfortable private parking space right at the house is ready for you. This allows you to unload your luggage relaxed and start your holiday immediately.
faq.q5: How much does an overnight stay cost?
faq.a5: €80 per night for 2 persons, year-round. Bed linen, towels, all utilities, WiFi and parking are already included in the price — no hidden costs.

contact.intro: We are Winfried & Christa Maringer — your hosts in Cochem. Book directly and personally with us, without impersonal portals and without booking fees. Simply send us a short message with your preferred dates — we usually respond the same day.

contact.form_error_checkout: Check-out must be after check-in (min. 5 nights)
